(A) 16 pounds
(B) 12 pounds
(C) 20 pounds
(D) 24 pounds
(E) 18 pounds
A: (A)

Combining like terms, we get 1.20x = $100.

x = $100 / 1.20 = $83.33 (rounded to two decimal places).
The cost price of the article was $83.
